member.name: T:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.BaseStream
member.summary: Base implementation of a data stream.

member.name: P:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.BaseStream.Length
member.summary: Gets the length of the stream in bytes.

member.name: P:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.BaseStream.Position
member.summary: Gets or sets the current position within the stream.

member.name: P:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.BaseStream.CanRead
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the stream supports reading.

member.name: P:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.BaseStream.CanWrite
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the stream supports writing.

member.name: P:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.BaseStream.CanSeek
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the stream supports seeking.

member.name: F:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.BaseStream.isDisposed
member.summary: The disposal flag.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.BaseStream.Dispose
member.summary: Disposes the stream.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.BaseStream.DisposeAsync
member.summary: Asynchronously disposes the stream.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.BaseStream.Flush
member.summary: Clears all buffers for this stream and causes any buffered data to be written.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.BaseStream.FlushAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously clears all buffers for this stream and causes any buffered data to be written.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.BaseStream.Seek(System.Int64,System.IO.SeekOrigin)
member.summary: Sets the position within the current stream.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.BaseStream.SetLength(System.Int64)
member.summary: Sets the stream's length to .
member.param: The new length of the stream.

member.name: T:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileReadStream
member.summary: Represents a read-only file stream.

member.name: P:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileReadStream.CanRead
member.summary: Indicates whether the stream supports reading.

member.name: P:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileReadStream.CanWrite
member.summary: Indicates whether the stream supports writing.

member.name: F:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileReadStream._streamReader
member.summary: The binary reader for the file stream.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileReadStream.#ctor(Nomad.Core.FileSystem.Configs.FileReadConfig)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the FileReadStream class with the specified file path, mode, and access.
member.param: The path to the file to read from.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileReadStream.Read(System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Reads a sequence of bytes from the file stream and advances the position within the stream by the number of bytes read.
member.param: An array of bytes. When this method returns, the buffer contains the specified byte array with the values between offset and (offset + count - 1) replaced by the bytes read from the current source.
The zero-based byte offset in buffer at which to begin storing the data read from the current stream.
The maximum number of bytes to be read from the current stream.
member.returns: The total number of bytes read into the buffer. This can be less than the number of bytes requested if that many bytes are not currently available, or zero if the end of the stream has been reached.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileReadStream.Read(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Reads a sequence of bytes from the file stream and advances the position within the stream by the number of bytes read.
member.param: An array of bytes. When this method returns, the buffer contains the specified byte array with the values between offset and (offset + count - 1) replaced by the bytes read from the current source.
member.returns: The total number of bytes read into the buffer. This can be less than the number of bytes requested if that many bytes are not currently available, or zero if the end of the stream has been reached.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileReadStream.Read(System.Span{System.Byte},System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Reads a sequence of bytes from the file stream into a span and advances the position within the stream by the number of bytes read.
member.param: A span of bytes. When this method returns, the span contains the bytes read from the current source.
The zero-based byte offset in buffer at which to begin storing the data read from the current stream.
The maximum number of bytes to be read from the current stream.
member.returns: The total number of bytes read into the span. This can be less than the length of the span if that many bytes are not currently available, or zero if the end of the stream has been reached.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileReadStream.Read(System.Span{System.Byte})
member.summary: Reads a sequence of bytes from the file stream into a span and advances the position within the stream by the number of bytes read.
member.param: A span of bytes. When this method returns, the span contains the bytes read from the current source.
member.returns: The total number of bytes read into the span. This can be less than the length of the span if that many bytes are not currently available, or zero if the end of the stream has been reached.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileReadStream.ReadAsync(System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously reads a sequence of bytes from the file stream and advances the position within the stream by the number of bytes read.
member.param: An array of bytes. When this method returns, the buffer contains the specified byte array with the values between offset and (offset + count - 1) replaced by the bytes read from the current source.
The zero-based byte offset in buffer at which to begin storing the data read from the current stream.
The maximum number of bytes to be read from the current stream.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous read operation, containing the total number of bytes read into the buffer.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileReadStream.ReadAsync(System.Memory{System.Byte},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously reads a sequence of bytes from the file stream into a memory buffer and advances the position within the stream by the number of bytes read.
member.param: A memory buffer. When this method returns, the buffer contains the bytes read from the current source.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous read operation, containing the total number of bytes read into the buffer.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileReadStream.ReadToEnd
member.summary: Reads all remaining bytes from the current position to the end of the file stream.
member.returns: A byte array containing the remaining data in the stream.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileReadStream.ReadToEndAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously reads all remaining bytes from the current position to the end of the file stream.
member.param: A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous read operation, containing a byte array with the remaining data.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileReadStream.WriteToStream(Nomad.Core.FileSystem.Streams.IWriteStream)
member.summary: Writes the entire content of this stream to the provided stream.
member.param: The stream to write to.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileReadStream.WriteToStreamAsync(Nomad.Core.FileSystem.Streams.IWriteStream,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously writes the entire content of this stream to the provided stream.
member.param: The stream to write to.
The token to monitor for cancellation requests.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileReadStream.ToArray
member.summary: Reads the entire file stream into a byte array.
member.returns: A byte array containing all data from the file stream.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileReadStream.ReadByte
member.summary: Reads an unsigned byte from the file stream.
member.returns: The unsigned byte value read from the stream.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileReadStream.ReadDouble
member.summary: Reads a double-precision floating-point number from the file stream.
member.returns: The double value read from the stream.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileReadStream.ReadFloat
member.summary: Reads a single-precision floating-point number from the file stream.
member.returns: The float value read from the stream.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileReadStream.ReadFloat32
member.summary: Reads a 32-bit floating-point number from the file stream.
member.returns: The 32-bit float value read from the stream.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileReadStream.ReadFloat64
member.summary: Reads a 64-bit floating-point number from the file stream.
member.returns: The 64-bit double value read from the stream.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileReadStream.ReadInt
member.summary: Reads a 32-bit signed integer from the file stream.
member.returns: The 32-bit signed integer value read from the stream.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileReadStream.ReadInt16
member.summary: Reads a 16-bit signed integer from the file stream.
member.returns: The 16-bit signed integer value read from the stream.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileReadStream.ReadInt32
member.summary: Reads a 32-bit signed integer from the file stream.
member.returns: The 32-bit signed integer value read from the stream.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileReadStream.ReadInt64
member.summary: Reads a 64-bit signed integer from the file stream.
member.returns: The 64-bit signed integer value read from the stream.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileReadStream.ReadInt8
member.summary: Reads an 8-bit signed integer from the file stream.
member.returns: The 8-bit signed integer value read from the stream.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileReadStream.ReadLong
member.summary: Reads a 64-bit signed integer from the file stream.
member.returns: The 64-bit signed integer value read from the stream.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileReadStream.ReadSByte
member.summary: Reads a signed byte from the file stream.
member.returns: The signed byte value read from the stream.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileReadStream.ReadShort
member.summary: Reads a 16-bit signed integer from the file stream.
member.returns: The 16-bit signed integer value read from the stream.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileReadStream.ReadSingle
member.summary: Reads a single-precision floating-point number from the file stream.
member.returns: The single-precision float value read from the stream.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileReadStream.ReadString
member.summary: Reads a string from the file stream.
member.returns: The string value read from the stream.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileReadStream.ReadUInt
member.summary: Reads a 32-bit unsigned integer from the file stream.
member.returns: The 32-bit unsigned integer value read from the stream.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileReadStream.ReadUInt16
member.summary: Reads a 16-bit unsigned integer from the file stream.
member.returns: The 16-bit unsigned integer value read from the stream.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileReadStream.ReadUInt32
member.summary: Reads a 32-bit unsigned integer from the file stream.
member.returns: The 32-bit unsigned integer value read from the stream.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileReadStream.ReadUInt64
member.summary: Reads a 64-bit unsigned integer from the file stream.
member.returns: The 64-bit unsigned integer value read from the stream.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileReadStream.ReadUInt8
member.summary: Reads an 8-bit unsigned integer from the file stream.
member.returns: The 8-bit unsigned integer value read from the stream.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileReadStream.ReadULong
member.summary: Reads a 64-bit unsigned integer from the file stream.
member.returns: The 64-bit unsigned integer value read from the stream.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileReadStream.ReadUShort
member.summary: Reads a 16-bit unsigned integer from the file stream.
member.returns: The 16-bit unsigned integer value read from the stream.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileReadStream.ReadBoolean
member.summary: Reads an 8-bit boolean from the file stream.
member.returns: The 8-bit boolean value read from the stream.

member.name: T:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileStreamBase
member.summary: Base implementation of a file stream.

member.name: P:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileStreamBase.CanSeek
member.summary: Indicates whether the stream supports seeking.

member.name: P:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileStreamBase.Position
member.summary: Gets or sets the current position within the file stream.

member.name: P:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileStreamBase.Length
member.summary: Gets the length of the file stream in bytes.

member.name: P:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileStreamBase.FilePath
member.summary: Gets the file path associated with the file stream.

member.name: P:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileStreamBase.IsOpen
member.summary: Indicates whether the file stream is currently open.

member.name: F:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileStreamBase.fileStream
member.summary: The underlying file stream.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileStreamBase.Dispose
member.summary: Releases all resources used by the file stream.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileStreamBase.DisposeAsync
member.summary: Asynchronously releases all resources used by the file stream.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileStreamBase.Close
member.summary: Closes the file stream.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileStreamBase.Flush
member.summary: Flushes the file stream's buffer to the underlying file.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileStreamBase.FlushAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously flushes the file stream's buffer to the underlying file.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileStreamBase.Seek(System.Int64,System.IO.SeekOrigin)
member.summary: Sets the file stream's position to the specified offset based on the given origin.
member.returns: The new position in the file stream.

member.name: T:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileWriter
member.summary: A unified writer that can write to either a text (StreamWriter) or binary (BinaryWriter) stream.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileWriter.#ctor(System.IO.StreamWriter)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance for text writing.
member.param: The underlying StreamWriter.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileWriter.#ctor(System.IO.BinaryWriter)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance for binary writing.
member.param: The underlying BinaryWriter.

member.name: T:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileWriteStream
member.summary: Represents a write-only file stream.

member.name: P:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileWriteStream.CanRead
member.summary: Indicates whether the stream supports reading.

member.name: P:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileWriteStream.CanWrite
member.summary: Indicates whether the stream supports writing.

member.name: F:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileWriteStream._streamWriter
member.summary: The binary writer for the file stream.

member.name: F:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileWriteStream._format
member.summary: The current output format of the stream.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileWriteStream.#ctor(Nomad.Core.FileSystem.Configs.FileWriteConfig)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the FileWriteStream class with the specified file path, mode, and access.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileWriteStream.Flush
member.summary: Flushes the file stream's buffer to the underlying file.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileWriteStream.FlushAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Flushes the file stream's buffer to the underlying file.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileWriteStream.Write(System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Writes a sequence of bytes to the file stream and advances the current position within this stream by the number of bytes written.
member.param: An array of bytes. This method copies count bytes from buffer to the current stream.
The zero-based byte offset in buffer at which to begin copying bytes to the current stream.
The number of bytes to be written to the current stream.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileWriteStream.Write(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Writes a sequence of bytes to the file stream and advances the current position within this stream by the number of bytes written.
member.param: An array of bytes. This method copies count bytes from buffer to the current stream.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileWriteStream.Write(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte},System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Writes a sequence of bytes to the file stream and advances the current position within this stream by the number of bytes written.
member.param: A read-only span of bytes. This method copies the contents of the span to the current stream.
The zero-based byte offset in buffer at which to begin copying bytes to the current stream.
The number of bytes to be written to the current stream.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileWriteStream.Write(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte})
member.summary: Writes a sequence of bytes to the file stream and advances the current position within this stream by the number of bytes written.
member.param: A read-only span of bytes. This method copies the contents of the span to the current stream.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileWriteStream.WriteAsync(System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously writes a sequence of bytes to the file stream and advances the current position within this stream by the number of bytes written.
member.param: An array of bytes. This method copies count bytes from buffer to the current stream.
The zero-based byte offset in buffer at which to begin copying bytes to the current stream.
The number of bytes to be written to the current stream.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous write operation.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileWriteStream.WriteAsync(System.ReadOnlyMemory{System.Byte},System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously writes a sequence of bytes to the file stream and advances the current position within this stream by the number of bytes written.
member.param: A read-only memory buffer. This method copies the contents of the buffer to the current stream.
The zero-based byte offset in buffer at which to begin copying bytes to the current stream.
The number of bytes to be written to the current stream.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous write operation.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileWriteStream.WriteAsync(System.ReadOnlyMemory{System.Byte},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously writes a sequence of bytes to the file stream and advances the current position within this stream by the number of bytes written.
member.param: A read-only memory buffer. This method copies the contents of the buffer to the current stream.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous write operation.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileWriteStream.WriteByte(System.Byte)
member.summary: Writes a byte to the file stream.
member.param: The byte value to write.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileWriteStream.WriteDouble(System.Double)
member.summary: Writes a double-precision floating-point number to the file stream.
member.param: The double value to write.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileWriteStream.WriteFloat(System.Single)
member.summary: Writes a single-precision floating-point number to the file stream.
member.param: The float value to write.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileWriteStream.WriteFloat32(System.Single)
member.summary: Writes a 32-bit floating-point number to the file stream.
member.param: The 32-bit float value to write.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileWriteStream.WriteFloat64(System.Double)
member.summary: Writes a 64-bit floating-point number to the file stream.
member.param: The 64-bit double value to write.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileWriteStream.WriteFromStream(Nomad.Core.FileSystem.Streams.IReadStream)
member.summary: Reads all bytes from the specified read stream and writes them to the file stream.
member.param: The read stream to copy from.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileWriteStream.WriteFromStreamAsync(Nomad.Core.FileSystem.Streams.IReadStream,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously reads all bytes from the specified read stream and writes them to the file stream.
member.param: The read stream to copy from.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous copy operation.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileWriteStream.WriteInt(System.Int32)
member.summary: Writes a 32-bit signed integer to the file stream.
member.param: The 32-bit signed integer value to write.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileWriteStream.WriteInt16(System.Int16)
member.summary: Writes a 16-bit signed integer to the file stream.
member.param: The 16-bit signed integer value to write.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileWriteStream.WriteInt32(System.Int32)
member.summary: Writes a 32-bit signed integer to the file stream.
member.param: The 32-bit signed integer value to write.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileWriteStream.WriteInt64(System.Int64)
member.summary: Writes a 64-bit signed integer to the file stream.
member.param: The 64-bit signed integer value to write.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileWriteStream.WriteInt8(System.SByte)
member.summary: Writes an 8-bit signed integer to the file stream.
member.param: The 8-bit signed integer value to write.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileWriteStream.WriteLong(System.Int64)
member.summary: Writes a 64-bit signed integer to the file stream.
member.param: The 64-bit signed integer value to write.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileWriteStream.WriteSByte(System.SByte)
member.summary: Writes a signed byte to the file stream.
member.param: The signed byte value to write.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileWriteStream.WriteShort(System.Int16)
member.summary: Writes a 16-bit signed integer to the file stream.
member.param: The 16-bit signed integer value to write.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileWriteStream.WriteSingle(System.Single)
member.summary: Writes a single-precision floating-point number to the file stream.
member.param: The single-precision float value to write.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileWriteStream.WriteString(System.String)
member.summary: Writes a string to the file stream.
member.param: The string value to write.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileWriteStream.WriteUInt(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Writes a 32-bit unsigned integer to the file stream.
member.param: The 32-bit unsigned integer value to write.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileWriteStream.WriteUInt16(System.UInt16)
member.summary: Writes a 16-bit unsigned integer to the file stream.
member.param: The 16-bit unsigned integer value to write.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileWriteStream.WriteUInt32(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Writes a 32-bit unsigned integer to the file stream.
member.param: The 32-bit unsigned integer value to write.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileWriteStream.WriteUInt64(System.UInt64)
member.summary: Writes a 64-bit unsigned integer to the file stream.
member.param: The 64-bit unsigned integer value to write.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileWriteStream.WriteUInt8(System.Byte)
member.summary: Writes an 8-bit unsigned integer to the file stream.
member.param: The 8-bit unsigned integer value to write.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileWriteStream.WriteULong(System.UInt64)
member.summary: Writes a 64-bit unsigned integer to the file stream.
member.param: The 64-bit unsigned integer value to write.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.FileStreams.FileWriteStream.WriteUShort(System.UInt16)
member.summary: Writes a 16-bit unsigned integer to the file stream.
member.param: The 16-bit unsigned integer value to write.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.MemoryStream.MemoryFileReadStream.#ctor(Nomad.Core.FileSystem.Configs.MemoryFileReadConfig)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the MemoryFileReadStream class with the specified file path.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.MemoryStream.MemoryFileReadStream.Open(System.String)
member.summary: Opens the memory file read stream with the specified file path, open mode, and access mode.
member.param: The path to the file to open.
member.returns: true if the file was opened successfully; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.MemoryStream.MemoryFileReadStream.AllocateBuffer(System.Int64)
member.summary: Creates a new based on the allocation strategy provided.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.MemoryStream.MemoryFileWriteStream.Flush
member.summary: Flushes the memory file write stream to the underlying file.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.MemoryStream.MemoryFileWriteStream.FlushAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously flushes the memory file write stream to the underlying file.
member.param: The cancellation token to use for the operation.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.MemoryStream.MemoryFileWriteStream.Open(Nomad.Core.FileSystem.Configs.MemoryFileWriteConfig)
member.summary: Opens the memory file write stream with the specified file path, open mode, and access mode.
member.returns: true if the file was opened successfully; otherwise, false.

member.name: P:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.MemoryStream.MemoryReadStream.CanRead
member.summary: Whether the stream can be read from.

member.name: P:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.MemoryStream.MemoryReadStream.CanWrite
member.summary: Whether the stream can be written to.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.MemoryStream.MemoryReadStream.#ctor(Nomad.Core.FileSystem.Configs.MemoryReadConfig,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the MemoryReadStream class with the specified buffer and length.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.MemoryStream.MemoryReadStream.Flush
member.summary: Flushes the stream. (Not implemented for read-only streams)

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.MemoryStream.MemoryReadStream.FlushAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously flushes the stream. (Not implemented for read-only streams)
member.param: A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous flush operation.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.MemoryStream.MemoryReadStream.Read(System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Reads a sequence of bytes from the current stream and advances the position within the stream by the number of bytes read.
member.param: An array of bytes. When this method returns, the buffer contains the specified byte array with the values between offset and (offset + count - 1) replaced by the bytes read from the current source.
The zero-based byte offset in buffer at which to begin storing the data read from the current stream.
The maximum number of bytes to be read from the current stream.
member.returns: The total number of bytes read into the buffer. This can be less than the number of bytes requested if that many bytes are not currently available, or zero if the end of the stream has been reached.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.MemoryStream.MemoryReadStream.Read(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Reads a sequence of bytes from the current stream and advances the position within the stream by the number of bytes read.
member.param: An array of bytes. When this method returns, the buffer contains the specified byte array with the values between offset and (offset + count - 1) replaced by the bytes read from the current source.
member.returns: The total number of bytes read into the buffer. This can be less than the number of bytes requested if that many bytes are not currently available, or zero if the end of the stream has been reached.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.MemoryStream.MemoryReadStream.Read(System.Span{System.Byte},System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Reads a sequence of bytes from the current stream into a span and advances the position within the stream by the number of bytes read.
member.param: A span of bytes. When this method returns, the span contains the bytes read from the current source.
The zero-based byte offset in buffer at which to begin storing the data read from the current stream.
The maximum number of bytes to be read from the current stream.
member.returns: The total number of bytes read into the span. This can be less than the length of the span if that many bytes are not currently available, or zero if the end of the stream has been reached.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.MemoryStream.MemoryReadStream.Read(System.Span{System.Byte})
member.summary: Reads a sequence of bytes from the current stream into a span and advances the position within the stream by the number of bytes read.
member.param: A span of bytes. When this method returns, the span contains the bytes read from the current source.
member.returns: The total number of bytes read into the span. This can be less than the length of the span if that many bytes are not currently available, or zero if the end of the stream has been reached.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.MemoryStream.MemoryReadStream.ReadAsync(System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously reads a sequence of bytes from the current stream and advances the position within the stream by the number of bytes read.
member.param: An array of bytes. When this method returns, the buffer contains the specified byte array with the values between offset and (offset + count - 1) replaced by the bytes read from the current source.
The zero-based byte offset in buffer at which to begin storing the data read from the current stream.
The maximum number of bytes to be read from the current stream.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous read operation, containing the total number of bytes read into the buffer.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.MemoryStream.MemoryReadStream.ReadAsync(System.Memory{System.Byte},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously reads a sequence of bytes from the current stream into a memory buffer and advances the position within the stream by the number of bytes read.
member.param: A memory buffer. When this method returns, the buffer contains the bytes read from the current source.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous read operation, containing the total number of bytes read into the buffer.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.MemoryStream.MemoryReadStream.ReadToEnd
member.summary: Reads all remaining bytes from the current position to the end of the stream.
member.returns: A byte array containing the remaining data in the stream.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.MemoryStream.MemoryReadStream.ReadToEndAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously reads all remaining bytes from the current position to the end of the stream.
member.param: A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous read operation, containing a byte array with the remaining data.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.MemoryStream.MemoryReadStream.WriteToStream(Nomad.Core.FileSystem.Streams.IWriteStream)
member.summary: Writes the entire content of this stream to the provided stream.
member.param: The stream to write to.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.MemoryStream.MemoryReadStream.WriteToStreamAsync(Nomad.Core.FileSystem.Streams.IWriteStream,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously writes the entire content of this stream to the provided stream.
member.param: The stream to write to.
The token to monitor for cancellation requests.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.MemoryStream.MemoryReadStream.ToArray
member.summary: Returns the underlying buffer as a byte array.
member.returns: The underlying byte array.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.MemoryStream.MemoryReadStream.ReadSByte
member.summary: Reads a signed byte from the stream.
member.returns: The signed byte value read from the stream.

member.summary: Reads a 16-bit signed integer from the stream.
member.returns: The 16-bit signed integer value read from the stream.

member.summary: Reads a 32-bit signed integer from the stream.

member.returns: The 32-bit unsigned integer value read from the stream.

member.summary: Reads an 8-bit signed integer from the stream.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.MemoryStream.MemoryReadStream.ReadBoolean
member.summary: Reads an 8-bit value from the stream.
member.returns: The 8-bit value read from the stream

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.MemoryStream.MemoryReadStream.ReadString
member.summary: Reads a UTF-8 encoded string from the stream, prefixed with its length as a 7-bit encoded integer.
member.returns: The string read from the stream.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.MemoryStream.MemoryReadStream.Read7BitEncodedInt
member.summary: Reads an encoded/compressed integer from the save file stream.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.MemoryStream.MemoryReadStream.AllocateBuffer(System.Int64)
member.summary: Creates a new based on the allocation strategy provided.

member.name: P:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.MemoryStream.MemoryStreamBase.Buffer
member.summary: The handle to the underlying buffer.

member.name: P:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.MemoryStream.MemoryStreamBase.CanSeek
member.summary: Always true.

member.name: F:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.MemoryStream.MemoryStreamBase.strategy
member.summary: Controls how we allocate the memory for the buffer internally.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.MemoryStream.MemoryStreamBase.DisposeAsyncCore
member.returns: The for the disposal method.

member.name: F:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.MemoryStream.MemoryWriteStream.MAX_CAPACITY
member.summary: The maximum possible length of the buffer. Set to 1 GiB because of integer limitations.

member.name: F:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.MemoryStream.MemoryWriteStream.STACK_ALLOC_THRESHOLD
member.summary: The maximum length of a string allowed for stack-based writes before we start writing segments.

member.name: F:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.MemoryStream.MemoryWriteStream.DEFAULT_CAPACITY
member.summary: The default initial capacity of a .

member.name: P:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.MemoryStream.MemoryWriteStream.CanRead
member.summary: Marks whether the stream can be read from. Always false.

member.name: P:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.MemoryStream.MemoryWriteStream.CanWrite
member.summary: Marks whether the stream can be read from. Always true.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.MemoryStream.MemoryWriteStream.#ctor(Nomad.Core.FileSystem.Configs.MemoryWriteConfig)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the MemoryWriteStream class with the specified initial length and fixed size option.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.MemoryStream.MemoryWriteStream.Flush
member.summary: Flushes the stream. This operation is a no-op for memory streams.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.MemoryStream.MemoryWriteStream.FlushAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously flushes the stream. This operation is a no-op for memory streams.
member.param: A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous flush operation.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.MemoryStream.MemoryWriteStream.Write(System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Writes a sequence of bytes to the current stream and advances the current position within this stream by the number of bytes written.
member.param: An array of bytes. This method copies count bytes from buffer to the current stream.
The zero-based byte offset in buffer at which to begin copying bytes to the current stream.
The number of bytes to be written to the current stream.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.MemoryStream.MemoryWriteStream.Write(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Writes a sequence of bytes to the current stream and advances the current position within this stream by the number of bytes written.
member.param: An array of bytes. This method copies count bytes from buffer to the current stream.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.MemoryStream.MemoryWriteStream.Write(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte},System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Writes a sequence of bytes to the current stream and advances the current position within this stream by the number of bytes written.
member.param: A read-only span of bytes. This method copies the contents of the span to the current stream.
The zero-based byte offset in buffer at which to begin copying bytes to the current stream.
The number of bytes to be written to the current stream.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.MemoryStream.MemoryWriteStream.Write(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte})
member.summary: Writes a sequence of bytes to the current stream and advances the current position within this stream by the number of bytes written.
member.param: A read-only span of bytes. This method copies the contents of the span to the current stream.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.MemoryStream.MemoryWriteStream.WriteAsync(System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously writes a sequence of bytes to the current stream and advances the current position within this stream by the number of bytes written.
member.param: An array of bytes. This method copies count bytes from buffer to the current stream.
The zero-based byte offset in buffer at which to begin copying bytes to the current stream.
The number of bytes to be written to the current stream.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous write operation.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.MemoryStream.MemoryWriteStream.WriteAsync(System.ReadOnlyMemory{System.Byte},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously writes a sequence of bytes to the current stream and advances the current position within this stream by the number of bytes written.
member.param: A read-only memory buffer. This method copies the contents of the buffer to the current stream.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous write operation.

member.summary: Asynchronously writes a sequence of bytes to the current stream and advances the current position within this stream by the number of bytes written.
member.param: A read-only memory buffer. This method copies the contents of the buffer to the current stream.
The zero-based byte offset in buffer at which to begin copying bytes to the current stream.
The number of bytes to be written to the current stream.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous write operation.

member.summary: Reads all bytes from the specified read stream and writes them to the current stream.
member.param: The read stream to copy from.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.MemoryStream.MemoryWriteStream.WriteFromStreamAsync(Nomad.Core.FileSystem.Streams.IReadStream,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously reads all bytes from the specified read stream and writes them to the current stream.

member.summary: Writes an integer to the stream using 7-bit encoded format.
member.param: The integer value to write.

member.summary: Writes a byte to the current stream and advances the current position within this stream by one byte.
member.param: The byte to write to the stream.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.MemoryStream.MemoryWriteStream.EnsureCapacity(System.Int64)
member.summary: Ensures we have enough space in the buffer to support the provided required .
member.remarks: We're already checking the buffer is null from all the calling functions, so a null check isn't necessary here.
member.param: The bytes needed to write the data.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.MemoryStream.MemoryWriteStream.AllocateBuffer(System.Int64)
member.summary: Creates a new based on the allocation strategy provided

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.MemoryStream.MemoryWriteStream.Write``1(``0,System.Int32)
member.summary: Writes a value of an unmanaged type to the stream.
member.typeparam: The type of the value to write.
member.param: The value to write.
The size in bytes of the primitive we're writing.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.MemoryStream.MemoryWriteStream.BumpPosition(System.Int32)
member.summary: Adds to the position, increasing the stream's length if required.
member.param: The number of bytes we're adding to the stream.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.Services.FileSystemService.DeleteDirectory(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Deletes a directory at the specified path.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.Services.FileSystemService.DeleteFile(System.String)
member.summary: Deletes a file at the specified path.
member.param: The path of the file to delete.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.Services.FileSystemService.FileExists(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if a file exists at the specified path.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.Services.FileSystemService.GetConfigPath
member.summary: Gets the configuration path.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.Services.FileSystemService.GetResourcePath
member.summary: Gets the resource path.
member.returns: The resource path.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.Services.FileSystemService.GetSavePath
member.summary: Gets the save directory.
member.returns: The save directory path.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.Services.FileSystemService.GetUserDataPath
member.summary: Gets the user data directory.
member.returns: The user data directory path.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.Services.FileSystemService.GetDirectories(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the directories at the specified path.
member.param: The path to get directories from.
member.returns: A list of directory paths.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.Services.FileSystemService.GetFiles(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Gets the files at the specified path.
member.param: The path to get files from.
The search pattern to use.
Whether to search recursively.
member.returns: A list of file paths.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.Services.FileSystemService.GetFileSize(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the size of the file at the specified path.
member.param: The path of the file to get the size of.
member.returns: The size of the file in bytes.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.Services.FileSystemService.GetLastWriteTime(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the last write time of the file at the specified path.
member.param: The path of the file to get the last write time of.
member.returns: The last write time of the file.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.Services.FileSystemService.MoveFile(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Moves a file from the source path to the destination path.
member.param: The path of the file to move.
The path to move the file to.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.Services.FileSystemService.OpenRead(Nomad.Core.FileSystem.IReadConfig)
member.summary: Opens a read stream for the specified file path.
member.param: How to create the stream and rules around how it should be handled.
member.returns: The read stream for the specified file path.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.Services.FileSystemService.OpenReadAsync(Nomad.Core.FileSystem.IReadConfig,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Opens a read stream for the specified file path asynchronously.
member.param: How to create the stream and rules around how it should be handled.
The cancellation token.
member.returns: The read stream for the specified file path.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.Services.FileSystemService.OpenWrite(Nomad.Core.FileSystem.IWriteConfig)
member.summary: Opens a write stream for the specified file path.
member.param: How to create the stream and rules around how it should be handled.
member.returns: The write stream for the specified file path.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.Services.FileSystemService.OpenWriteAsync(Nomad.Core.FileSystem.IWriteConfig,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Opens a write stream with the specified configuration asynchronously.
member.param: How to create the stream and rules around how it should be handled.
The cancellation token.
member.returns: The write stream with the specified configuration.

member.name: T:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.Services.RecursiveFileSearcher
member.summary: A Quake 3‑style file search system that searches through multiple base directories in priority order. Files are located by exact relative paths only.

member.name: P:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.Services.RecursiveFileSearcher.SearchDirectories
member.summary: Gets all search directories in their current priority order.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.Services.RecursiveFileSearcher.#ctor(Nomad.Core.Logger.ILoggerCategory,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: If true, file lookups are case‑insensitive (recommended for cross‑platform).
If true, builds an in‑memory index of all files for faster lookups (may impact startup time).

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.Services.RecursiveFileSearcher.AddSearchDirectory(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Adds a search directory with optional priority.
member.param: Directory to add.
If true, adds to beginning of search list; otherwise appends.
member.exception: Thrown if directory is null or empty.
Thrown if directory does not exist.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.Services.RecursiveFileSearcher.FindFile(System.String)
member.summary: Finds a file by its exact relative path. Returns the full path of the first match according to search directory priority, or null if not found.
member.param: Relative path to the file (e.g., "Textures/wood.png").
member.returns: Full path to the found file, or null.
member.exception: Thrown if relativePath is null or empty.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.Services.RecursiveFileSearcher.FindAllFiles(System.String)
member.summary: Finds all occurrences of a file across all search directories, ordered by priority.
member.param: Relative path to search for.
member.returns: List of full paths (may be empty).

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.Services.RecursiveFileSearcher.FindFiles(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Finds files matching a pattern (e.g., "*.png") in a specific relative subdirectory. Returns a dictionary mapping each base directory to the list of matching files.
member.param: Search pattern (supports * and ?).
member.returns: Dictionary with results per base directory.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Private.Services.RecursiveFileSearcher.FindFileWithExtensions(System.String,System.String[])
member.summary: Finds a file by trying multiple file extensions.
member.param: Relative path without extension.
Extensions to try (e.g., ".json", ".yaml").
member.returns: Full path of first matching file, or null.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Global.FileSystem.GetSavePath
member.summary: Gets the save directory path.
member.returns: The save directory path.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Global.FileSystem.GetResourcePath
member.summary: Gets the resource directory path.
member.returns: The resource directory path.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Global.FileSystem.GetConfigPath
member.summary: Gets the configuration directory path.
member.returns: The configuration directory path.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Global.FileSystem.GetUserDataPath
member.summary: Gets the user data directory path.
member.returns: The user data directory path.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Global.FileSystem.FileExists(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if a file exists at the specified path.
member.param: The path to check.
member.returns: true if the file exists; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Global.FileSystem.DeleteFile(System.String)
member.summary: Deletes the file at the specified path.
member.param: The path of the file to delete.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Global.FileSystem.MoveFile(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Moves a file from the source path to the destination path.
member.param: The source path of the file to move.
The destination path of the file to move.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Global.FileSystem.CopyFile(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Copies a file from the source path to the destination path.
member.param: The source path of the file to copy.
The destination path of the file to copy.
Whether to overwrite an existing file at the destination path.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Global.FileSystem.GetLastWriteTime(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the last write time of the file at the specified path.
member.param: The path of the file.
member.returns: The last write time of the file.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Global.FileSystem.GetFileSize(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the size of the file at the specified path.
member.param: The path of the file.
member.returns: The size of the file in bytes.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Global.FileSystem.DirectoryExists(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if a directory exists at the specified path.
member.param: The path to check.
member.returns: true if the directory exists; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Global.FileSystem.CreateDirectory(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a directory at the specified path.
member.param: The path of the directory tso create.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Global.FileSystem.DeleteDirectory(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Deletes the directory at the specified path.
member.param: The path of the directory to delete.
Whether to recursively delete subdirectories and files.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Global.FileSystem.GetDirectories(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a list of directories at the specified path matching the search pattern.
member.param: The path of the directory to search.
member.returns: The list of matching directory paths.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Global.FileSystem.GetFiles(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Gets a list of files at the specified path matching the search pattern.
member.param: The path of the directory to search.
The search pattern to match against file names.
Whether to recursively search subdirectories.
member.returns: The list of matching file paths.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Global.FileSystem.OpenRead(Nomad.Core.FileSystem.IReadConfig)
member.summary: Opens a read stream for the specified file path.
member.param: How to create the stream and rules around how it should be handled.
member.returns: The opened read stream.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Global.FileSystem.OpenWrite(Nomad.Core.FileSystem.IWriteConfig)
member.summary: Opens a write stream for the specified file path.
member.param: How to create the stream and rules around how it should be handled.
member.returns: The opened write stream.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Global.FileSystem.OpenReadAsync(Nomad.Core.FileSystem.IReadConfig,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Opens a read stream for the specified file path.
member.param: Cancellation token.
member.returns: The opened read stream.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Global.FileSystem.OpenWriteAsync(Nomad.Core.FileSystem.IWriteConfig,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Opens a write stream for the specified file path.
member.param: How to create the stream and rules around how it should be handled.
Cancellation token.
member.returns: The opened write stream.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Global.FileSystem.CreateStream(System.IO.FileAccess,Nomad.Core.FileSystem.StreamType,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a memory stream.
member.param: The access mode to create the memory stream with.
Optional output file path for the memory stream.
The initial length of the memory stream.
member.returns: The created data stream.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Global.FileSystem.LoadFile(System.String)
member.summary: Loads a file into memory.
member.param: The file to open and load.
member.returns: The data retrieved from the file.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Global.FileSystem.LoadFileAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Loads a file into memory asynchronously.
member.param: The file to open and load.
member.returns: The data retrieved from the file.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Global.FileSystem.WriteFile(System.String,System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Writes a buffer to disk.
member.param: The file to write to.
The data to write to disk.

member.name: M:Nomad.FileSystem.Global.FileSystem.WriteFileAsync(System.String,System.ReadOnlyMemory{System.Byte},System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Writes a buffer asynchronously to disk.
member.param: The file to write to.
